author: makortel
body:
#### PR description:

This PR is preparatory work for EVOLUTION_X. It was motived by forward declarations of `LHEEventProduct`. It
* Moves contents of `LH5Source.h` to its source (rule 6.7 in https://cms-sw.github.io/cms_coding_rules.html#6--packaging-rules-1)
* Moves contents of `LHESource.h` to its source (rule 6.7)
* Moves contents of `ExhumeHadronizer.{h,cc}` to `ExhumeGeneratorFilter.cc`, and all contents of `interface` and `src` to `plugins` (rules 6.7 and 6.8)
* Replaces forward declaration of `LHEEventProduct` in `Pythia6Hadronizer.h` with the `#include` of the header, because the gains of the forward declaration there are minimal, and creating a header file for `LHEEventProduct` forward declaration would feel "too much".

Resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/2042.

#### PR validation:

Code compiles (at least in EVOLUTION_X branch)
title: Modernize code organization for LH5Source, LHESource, and ExhumeGeneratorFilter
